kfPrivate.tooltipTree: kf-private: not sent to model by default
kfPrivate.tooltipDocPrivate: Private note (kf-private: true): the app does not send the full note text to the AI by default, and outbound checks treat it as sensitive. Click to remove kf-private and allow normal sharing when your rules permit.
kfPrivate.tooltipDocPublic: Public note: click to mark private (kf-private: true). The full note will not be sent to the AI by default and outbound checks will treat it as sensitive.
kfPrivate.ariaMarkPrivate: Mark document as kf-private in frontmatter

toolbar.thoughtVaultHubTitle: Open the all-thoughts hub: search, browse, and jump to thoughts in notes
toolbar.workspaceSearchTitle: Search keywords across Markdown files (disk snapshot)
toolbar.thoughtManagementPageTitle: Open full-screen thought management: filter, edit standalone and linked thoughts, deep chat with AI
toolbar.backToEditorTitle: Close thought management and return to notes

sidebar.chooseFolder: Choose a folder to load Markdown files from your workspace.
sidebar.thoughtVaultHubTitle: Open the all-thoughts hub: search, browse, and jump to thoughts in notes

main.loadError: Could not load this file from disk. The file may be missing, locked, or you may lack permission. Details: {{details}}
main.selectFile: Select a Markdown file from the sidebar to edit.
main.openFolderFirst: Open a folder to list Markdown files and start editing.
main.viewRawSourceTitle: View raw Markdown on disk (including front matter), without rendering
main.writingCoachBubbleHint: Light-touch ideas for your draft — click to open

diskNotice.text: This file was modified on disk while you have unsaved edits in the editor. Reload loads the on-disk version and discards your current buffer for this tab. Dismiss to keep editing (you may need to resolve the conflict manually).

dialogs.discardUnsavedTabs: You have unsaved changes in one or more tabs. Continuing will discard those edits. This usually happens when switching workspace or resetting the document list. Continue anyway?
dialogs.closeWindowDiskConflict: {{count}} tab(s) have a disk conflict: the file on disk changed and your unsaved edits were not written. Closing the window now will discard those unsaved changes in the editor. Close anyway?
dialogs.closeTab: Close tab for "{{name}}"? You have unsaved changes; closing discards the editor buffer unless you save first.
dialogs.unsavedAiSettings: You have unsaved AI settings. Close the settings panel without saving?
dialogs.deleteConversation: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
dialogs.renameUnsaved: "{{name}}" has unsaved changes. Closing the rename dialog does not delete your edits in the editor; they stay until you save or discard. Close the dialog anyway?
dialogs.renameFolderDirty: Some open tabs under this folder have unsaved changes. Renaming the folder updates their paths to match disk; your unsaved buffer content is kept, but paths shown in tabs will change. Continue?
dialogs.deleteFileDirty: "{{name}}" has unsaved changes in the editor. Deleting the file removes it from disk and closes the tab; those unsaved edits cannot be recovered. Delete anyway?
dialogs.deleteFileConfirm: Permanently delete "{{name}}" from the workspace? This removes the file from disk and cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteFolder: Delete folder "{{name}}"? Only allowed when the tree under it contains no files (empty subfolders are OK). Tabs for files inside this folder will be closed. This cannot be undone.

fileTree.revealActiveInTreeTitle: Expand folders and scroll to the currently open file
fileTree.empty: No Markdown files in this folder yet.

tabs.diskStaleTitle: {{path}} — modified on disk; unsaved edits may conflict with the file on disk

rightPanel.switchOutlineAi: Switch between outline, AI, and review
rightPanel.switchTabs: Switch between outline, AI, understanding graph, link suggestions, and review

linkRecommendation.title: Link suggestions
linkRecommendation.fetchTooltip: Fetch link suggestions from the semantic index for this note
linkRecommendation.insertAtCursorTooltip: Insert a wiki link at the editor cursor
linkRecommendation.appendToRelatedSectionTooltip: Append a list link under the “Related notes” heading at the end
linkRecommendation.ignoreTooltip: Hide this suggestion in this workspace
linkRecommendation.includeReasons: Ask the model for short reasons (slower)
linkRecommendation.workspaceRequired: Open a workspace to use semantic link suggestions.
linkRecommendation.modelNotReady: Embedding model is not ready. Check AI settings → semantic index.
linkRecommendation.noChunks: No document vectors in the index yet. Run “Rebuild embeddings” in settings.
linkRecommendation.indexRequired: Semantic index is required for link suggestions (no keyword fallback).
linkRecommendation.empty: No suggestions yet. Click “Suggest links” when the index is ready.
linkRecommendation.keywordsAria: Terms overlapping with the current note text, indicating why this is suggested
linkRecommendation.insertFailed: Could not insert at the cursor (editor not ready).
linkRecommendation.appendDuplicateOrFailed: Already linked in the note, or the editor is not ready.

thoughtManagement.title: Thoughts
thoughtManagement.selectHint: Pick a thought from the list to view all fields and edit the body.
thoughtManagement.thoughtAiPlaceholder: Message… (includes thought, linked note, workspace search; depth: deep)
thoughtManagement.thoughtAiEmptyMessages: Ask about the selected thought. Each request includes the thought body, linked note when present, and workspace search snippets.
thoughtManagement.contextIncludedReminderAria: Workspace context included in this turn
thoughtManagement.aiDockCaption: AI chat (linked to the selected thought)
thoughtManagement.confirmDelete: Delete this thought? This cannot be undone.
thoughtManagement.orphanCalloutHint: A legacy callout block may remain in the note; you can remove it manually.
thoughtManagement.exitUnsavedMessage: The thought body has been edited but not saved. Exit thought management and discard these edits?
thoughtManagement.leaveDetailUnsavedMessage: The thought body has been edited but not saved. Discard your edits?

topicNetwork.emptyGraph: No topic–document graph yet (each topic must appear in at least 2 notes). Configure an AI model in settings, then refresh.
topicNetwork.emptyNoLlm: Topic extraction requires an AI model. Pick a model in settings, then retry.
topicNetwork.rebuildTitle: Rescan vault, extract topics, and rebuild the graph
topicNetwork.exportDone: Wrote {{count}} topic pages under {{path}} (relative to workspace root).
topicNetwork.addTopicIconTitle: Add topic: semantic search and link notes
topicNetwork.exportMdIconTitle: Export topic index as Markdown under .knowforge/topics/export
topicNetwork.addTopicHint: Adds the label to the topic dictionary and searches all indexed document chunks: notes above a similarity threshold get this topic merged (up to 5 topics per note). A topic node appears only when the topic appears in at least two notes.
topicNetwork.addTopicPlaceholder: e.g. Rust async or product requirements
topicNetwork.addTopicDoneZero: No notes met the similarity threshold (canonical: {{canonical}}). Rebuild the embedding index first, or use Rebuild with LLM extraction later. Graph refreshed.

understandingGraph.hidden: {{n}} nodes hidden due to the 200-node limit
understandingGraph.expandWideTitle: Widen side panel to about 70% of window width
understandingGraph.collapseWideTitle: Restore side panel to the width before widening
understandingGraph.emptyVault: No non-private Markdown notes to display, or the workspace is not open. Gray nodes are notes without saved thoughts yet.
understandingGraph.webEmpty: The understanding graph is only available in the desktop app.

aiPanel.noModel: No model selected. Choose a model in settings.
aiPanel.privacyPlaceholder: Private note: the model will receive a placeholder instead of file contents.
aiPanel.vaultStoppedEarly: (scan capped by time or file limit.)
aiPanel.placeholderDesktop: AI is only available in the desktop app.
aiPanel.placeholderStreaming: Draft next message… (Enter for newline; Stop/Cancel, then Enter to send)
aiPanel.placeholderCompose: Message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
aiPanel.toolApprovalDescription: The assistant wants to call "{{tool}}". Review and decide.
aiPanel.skillUnknown: Unknown skill: {{id}}. Type / to see available skills, or use /skills to list them.
aiPanel.passiveHighlightSaveCue: This message may contain a thought worth saving
aiPanel.passiveHighlightHintNoProvider: Passive highlight requires a configured AI provider.
aiPanel.passiveHighlightHintShort: Message too short for passive detection.
aiPanel.passiveHighlightHintCap: Passive highlight limit reached for this chat.
aiPanel.contextSourcesAria: Context sources used for this reply

challengeReview.title: Quick review
challengeReview.sloppyHint: Worth sitting with a bit longer next time.
challengeReview.evaluateError: Could not evaluate your answer right now.
challengeReview.fallbackQuestion: You wrote this idea before — do you still agree with it?
challengeReview.panelDisabledHint: Turn on independent review in AI settings to use this mode.
challengeReview.panelNeedsLlm: Configure an AI provider to use challenge review. Create Thoughts first, then the system will schedule reviews for you.
challengeReview.panelEmpty: No thoughts are due for review today.
challengeReview.panelShallow: Shallow depth mode skips challenge review.
challengeReview.panelNoMore: No more items in this batch.
challengeReview.panelIndependentCap: You've reached today's limit for independent reviews. Come back tomorrow.
challengeReview.maturitySignalHint: Challenge passed: maturity signal updated (saved to your note).
challengeReview.panelDailyBatchHint: {{total}} due right now; this batch shows {{shown}} (daily cap). The rest roll to the next day or are reserved for inline review today. Work through this batch, or continue tomorrow.
challengeReview.panelBatchListPickHint: While choosing, click a row to switch the active entry.
challengeReview.panelEmptySecondary: When depth is sufficient, inline challenge review may still appear at the end of AI replies.
challengeReview.panelIndependentCapHint: Raise the daily cap in AI & LLM settings (applies after save).

privacy.sharedDocWarning: This document was shared with the AI in this conversation. For full privacy protection, start a new conversation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.backupKnowforgeHint: When backing up this workspace, include the hidden folder `.knowforge` (thought bodies live in `.knowforge/thoughts/index.sqlite`; Markdown alone is not enough).
settings.versionFallback: Could not read the packaged application version; showing build metadata fallback.
settings.aiSectionsIntro: Each card is a separate group; use titles and the accent bar to scan settings.
settings.ollamaHint: Base URL for your local Ollama HTTP API (often localhost as in the placeholder). Start Ollama and pull models first; the Refresh models button fetches the list from this endpoint.
settings.allowPrivateLocal: Allow private note content in prompts for local LLM
settings.toolsEnabledHint: When enabled, the AI may invoke local tools and built-in skills (skill.*) during chat. Disable to return to plain streaming replies.
settings.planningEnabledHint: When enabled, the AI plans tool calls before executing them using the active provider.
settings.memoryEnabledHint: When enabled, the AI remembers your knowledge domains, interaction style, and corrections across conversations to provide more personalized responses.
settings.clearMemoryConfirm: This will permanently delete all agent memory data. The AI will start fresh with no knowledge of your preferences. Continue?
settings.isRemoteHint: kf-private notes will be redacted before sending.
settings.noProviderConfigured: No AI provider configured. Add one above.
settings.writingCoachEnable: Low-distraction writing hints in the editor (questions only)
settings.writingCoachIdleSecondsHint: No edits for this many seconds before a bubble can appear (5–600).
settings.writingCoachDepthMinCharsHint: Current block must reach this size for the “long writing” path (10–20000).
settings.writingCoachTermMinCharsHint: Minimum block size before running the term-density heuristic (8–2000).
settings.writingCoachBubbleSecondsHint: If the bubble is not clicked, it fades after this long (5–600).
settings.writingCoachCooldownMinutesHint: After an ignored bubble, wait this long before another can appear (1–1440).
settings.errWritingCoachParams: Writing coach numbers are out of range. Check the hints under each field.
settings.challengeReviewDailyCapHint: Each channel allows 1–20; the workspace clamps values on save.
settings.errChallengeReviewCaps: Review daily caps must be integers from 1 to 20.
settings.saveNeedWorkspace: Open a workspace in the desktop app to save settings.
settings.errTimeout: Request timeout must be between 1000 and 600000 (ms).
settings.errTopP: Top-p must be between 0 and 1 (or leave empty).
settings.errPassiveConfidence: Passive highlight confidence minimum must be between 0 and 1.
settings.errMaxCtx: Max context tokens must be a positive integer or empty.
settings.semanticEnable: Enable semantic indexing and semantic excerpts in chat
settings.semanticAutoIndex: Auto-update embeddings when a note is saved
settings.semanticSearchWeightHint: RRF fusion with keyword results: this is the semantic side; the rest goes to keyword rank.
settings.semanticErrWeight: Semantic weight must be between 0 and 1.
settings.semanticLastBuild: Last run: {{chunks}} doc chunk(s), {{thoughts}} thought vector(s), {{ms}} ms
settings.semanticModelMissingHint: Place BAAI bge-small-zh-v1.5 files (config.json, tokenizer.json, model.safetensors) under bundled resources models/bge-small-zh-v1.5/ or cache ~/.cache/knowforge/models/bge-small-zh-v1.5/.
settings.searchSearxngHelp: URL of your SearXNG instance (e.g. http://localhost:8080). Must use http or https.
settings.searchTavilyHelp: Get a free API key from tavily.com. Requires international network access.
settings.searchAliyunHelp: Get API key from Alibaba Cloud AI Search Platform console (opensearch.console.aliyun.com).

errors.diskConflictSave: The file changed on disk again between our read (for the save lock) and the write (for example concurrent saves or sync). Your edits were not written. Auto-save will retry; you can also save manually or reload to merge.
errors.workspaceGone: The saved workspace folder is no longer available (moved, deleted, or permission denied). Please choose a folder again.
errors.invalidFolderName: Invalid folder name: do not use path separators (/ or \).
errors.invalidFileName: Invalid file name: no slashes; .md is added if you omit the extension.
errors.fileExists: A Markdown file with this name already exists at that location.

commandPalette.footerHint: Esc to close · ⌘⇧P / Ctrl+Shift+P · ⌘F / Ctrl+F find in editor

workspaceSearch.title: Search workspace
workspaceSearch.diskOnlyHint: Only saved files on disk are searched; unsaved edits may be missing.

cognitiveReport.title: Cognitive growth report
cognitiveReport.disabledHint: Reports are turned off. Uncheck "Disable reports" below to load data.
cognitiveReport.scanMeta: Scanned {{files}} Markdown files · {{thoughts}} thoughts in metadata
cognitiveReport.noPrevMonth: No prior month snapshot yet (saved automatically when you open this report).
cognitiveReport.noTimelines: No history entries to list yet.

skillMgmt.title: Skill management
skillMgmt.empty: No skills yet. Click “New skill” to create your first one.
skillMgmt.builtinReadOnly: Built-in skills cannot be edited or deleted
skillMgmt.builtinHint: This is a built-in skill, viewable only. Copy it as a new skill to customize.
skillMgmt.placeholderTitle: Pick a skill or create a new one
skillMgmt.placeholderHint: Click any skill on the left to view details, or click “New skill” to create a custom one.
skillMgmt.workspaceWarning: No workspace open or non-desktop runtime — saving is disabled. Open a workspace first.
skillMgmt.fieldIdHint: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores. Must start with a letter; length 2–64. Cannot be changed after creation.
skillMgmt.fieldPromptHint: Supports placeholders {{workspace_name}} and {{workspace_root}}; other {{...}} are kept as-is.
skillMgmt.fieldAutoInvocable: Allow LLM to auto-invoke this skill
skillMgmt.fieldAutoInvocableHint: When enabled, the skill is registered as a tool named skill.<id> so the LLM can call it during a conversation.
skillMgmt.toolsFilterPlaceholder: Filter tools by name or description…
skillMgmt.toolsOrphan: These tools are not currently registered but will still be saved: {{tools}}
skillMgmt.confirmDelete: Delete skill “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
skillMgmt.errInvalidId: Invalid ID: must start with a lowercase letter, contain only [a-z0-9_], length 2–64.
skillMgmt.errMaxToolCalls: Max tool calls must be between 0 and 64.
skillMgmt.errTimeout: Timeout must be between 5 and 1800 seconds.

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Let your notes help you think
onboarding.step1Desc: KnowForge turns your Markdown notes into an active learning system. It extracts key insights as "Thoughts" and uses spaced repetition challenges to help you truly internalize what you've written.
onboarding.step2Desc: Here's a sample Thought. Read it, then try answering the challenge question below.
onboarding.step2MaturityHint: After passing, 🌱 seedling grows into 🌿 growing
onboarding.step3Desc: With an AI provider configured, KnowForge can generate challenge questions for your own notes. You can always set this up later in Settings.
onboarding.step4Desc: Here are three things you can do right now:
onboarding.step4Tip1Desc: Select text in the editor → click the bookmark icon
onboarding.step4Tip2Desc: Open the Review tab in the right panel
onboarding.step4Tip3Desc: Press ⌘⇧Y / Ctrl+Shift+Y to jump to review
